ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was submitted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the user feedback */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application from which the feedback originated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of feedback (e.g., API Issue, Payment Problem) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the feedback (range: -1 to 1) */,
  "issue_category" TEXT /* Category of the issue reported by the user */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue reported by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES feedback_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the feedback entry this comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES feedback ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the feedback entry related to the bug report */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug report (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES feedback ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the person giving feedback */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up for the application */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account the user has (e.g., Basic, Premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries received on a specific date */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average time taken to respond to feedback on that date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the analytics data is recorded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., Technical Issue, Payment Problem) */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application for which the analytics data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_app_name FOREIGN KEY ("app_name") REFERENCES app_versions ("app_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the feedback entry this response is addressing */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Content of the response provided to the user */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was made */,
  "response_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who made the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES feedback ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback type (e.g., API Issue, Payment Problem) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Default severity level for this feedback type (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "app_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application version */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the application version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Mobile, Desktop) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system running on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)
